data.title: Plus Therapeutics Announces Reverse Stock Split
data.description: On March 31, 2026, Plus Therapeutics, Inc., a pharmaceutical company focusing on targeted radiotherapeutics for central nervous system cancers, announced a 1-for-25 reverse stock split approved by its Board of Directors. Effective from April 2, 2026, at 12:01 a.m. Eastern Time, the Company's common stock will start trading on The Nasdaq Capital Market under the symbol "PSTV" post-split. Additionally, a new CUSIP number, 72941H806, will be assigned to the stock.
Augmentum Fintech Plc disclosure notice under Form 8.3.

data.title: Odysight.ai® Announces Dual Listing on the Tel Aviv Stock Exchange
data.description: On March 31, 2026, Odysight.ai Inc. (NASDAQ: ODYS), a company specializing in AI-driven visual sensing solutions for predictive maintenance and condition-based monitoring, revealed that its common stock has been greenlit for trading on the Tel Aviv Stock Exchange (TASE). This marks a significant milestone for the company and presents new opportunities for investors in Israel.

data.title: NUBURU Wins Counter-Drone Directed-Energy Order from Tier-One Government Defense Electronics Organization, Entering Asia-Pacific Defense Market and $20B Global Opportunity
data.description: In Denver, NUBURU, Inc. revealed that its subsidiary, Lyocon S.r.l., has received an initial order for its portable directed-energy laser dazzler system for counter-drone defense applications. This order pertains to a tier-one government entity and marks a significant step for the company. NUBURU, Inc. is a Defense & Security platform firm concentrating on non-kinetic effects, directed-energy technologies, electronic warfare, and software-based defense systems. The subsidiary's success showcases the growing demand for advanced defense solutions, underscoring the company's potential in the market.
NervGen Pharma Reports Full Year 2025 Financial Results and Provides Business Updates

data.title: TomaGold Starts Drilling at Berrigan Mine
data.description: TomaGold Corporation (TSXV: LOT; OTCPK: TOGOF) has begun drilling at its Berrigan Mine project in the Chibougamau Mining Camp, Québec. The Phase 2 drilling program will involve around 1,500 meters of diamond drilling, focusing on five extension holes related to previous drill holes TOM-25-009 through TOM-25-013. The goal is to assess the Berrigan Deep zone at depth.

data.title: Kobo Resources Intersects Strong Gold Results Across All Three Zones at Kossou, Including 7.0 m at 5.06 g/t Au at the Road Cut Zone
data.description: In Quebec City, Kobo Resources Inc. (TSX.V: KRI) has announced positive results from ten new diamond drill holes at their Kossou Gold Project in Côte d'Ivoire. The drilling focused on the Jagger, Road Cut, and Kadie Zones, all owned entirely by Kobo. The findings confirm significant gold mineralization along strike and at depth in these zones. Particularly at the Road Cut Zone, drilling along the Contact Zone Fault has yielded promising results. This marks a step forward for Kobo in their exploration efforts at Kossou.

data.title: CoinDCX to launch anti-fraud network after founders cleared in impersonation case by Indian court. #cybersecurity #Coinbase
data.description: Following a court ruling in India that cleared CoinDCX’s founders of any wrongdoing, the cryptocurrency exchange - backed by Coinbase - announced plans to introduce an anti-fraud network. This initiative aims to address issues related to impersonation and cyber fraud. Key details include the implementation of advanced security protocols and systems to safeguard against fraudulent activities. This development underscores the company's commitment to enhancing security measures and protecting users from potential risks in the cryptocurrency space.

data.title: TON for Telegram apps now features dynamic ads with wallet integration, allowing devs to deploy TON wallets in Mini Apps with ease.
data.description: Developers now have the ability to seamlessly incorporate TON wallets into Telegram Mini Apps, eliminating the requirement to construct and oversee wallet infrastructure. This integration simplifies the deployment process, allowing for a smoother experience for developers and users.

data.title: Icon Global Named Official Partner of FEI World Cup™ Finals 2026 in Fort Worth
data.description: An agreement has been struck with Icon Global, a distinguished real estate company, to serve as the presenting sponsor for the VIP Reliant Club in Fort Worth, Texas. The deal, announced on March 31, 2026, designates Icon Global as an Official Partner of the FEI World Cup™. Icon Global is recognized for its expertise in exceptional, high-end properties globally. This partnership highlights their commitment to the prestigious event.

data.title: BTC price falls below $66K before US Defense Dept. briefing. Trapped late buyers at $68K, oil remains above $100. Secretary of Defense Hegseth to address.
data.description: Investors who purchased Bitcoin at $68,000 are currently experiencing losses as the cryptocurrency remains stagnant. Meanwhile, oil prices have surged above $100 per barrel. The upcoming news briefing to be held by US Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth has sparked interest and anticipation among market participants.

data.title: Apkudo Earns Back-to-Back Industry Recognition for Innovation Across the Device Lifecycle
data.description: Apkudo's Device Passport™ has been recognized in two major industry award programs, highlighting the industry's increasing focus on transparent, data-driven device management. The company made the shortlist for the prestigious GLOMO Awards and also emerged victorious at the Mobile News Awards. The recognition underscores the growing alignment within the industry towards effective device management practices. This announcement was made in London on March 31, 2026, marking a significant achievement for Apkudo in the tech sector.

data.title: Trump Tells Allies To 'Take' Strait Of Hormuz Themselves; Market Reacts
data.description: After a report by the Wall Street Journal suggesting that President Trump is willing to exit with the Strait of Hormuz closed, he has urged allies to handle the situation themselves. This statement comes amidst concerns over the strategic waterway, which sees approximately 21 million barrels of oil passing through daily. The market has responded to this news, with various stakeholders closely monitoring the developments.
13 people were injured in a fire at the Russia's "Nizhnekamskneftekhim" site, according to the Ministry of Emergency Situations

data.title: PVH Likely To Report Higher Q4 Earnings; These Most Accurate Analysts Revise Forecasts Ahead Of Earnings Call
data.description: PVH Corp. (NYSE: PVH) is set to announce its fourth-quarter earnings after the market closes on Tuesday, March 31. Analysts are predicting earnings of $3.30 per share for this quarter, showing growth from the previous year's $3.27 per share. The consensus forecast for quarterly revenue stands at $2.43 billion, an increase from the $2.37 billion reported last year. Recently, PVH declared a quarterly cash dividend of 3.75 cents per share. The company's stock closed at $66.56 on Monday, marking a 0.2% increase. For more in-depth analysis, readers can view analyst ratings on Benzinga Pro, which provides various sorting options. Visit Benzinga.com for the full story.
